title: Phone Call Directly from Monday Web or Desktop App
excerpt: Like SalesForce, please allow us to click Lead’s phone numbers directly from their number column and call them.  It would also be nice if it added an AI summary of the call to the emails and activities afterwards.

posts.author: Huey (Elijah)
posts.cookedHtml: Like SalesForce, please allow us to click Lead’s phone numbers directly from their number column and call them. It would also be nice if it added an AI summary of the call to the emails and activities afterwards.
